---
title: "Marcus Harris"
subtitle: "Psychometrics - Meta-Research - Measurement"
---

I build tools and theories for reliable measurement in psychology and education. My work focuses on psychometric modeling, meta-research, and open, reproducible methods.

**Profile**
- [View my profile](profile.qmd)

**Research Focus**
- Computational reproducibility and evaluation of research code
- Meta-research on scientific practices, incentives, and methodology
- Simulation-based methods and psychometric evaluation

**Current Work**
- Developing a rubric to evaluate reproducible statistical code
- Studying how researchers interpret and apply reproducibility standards
- Building open teaching materials for reproducible computational research

**Essays**
- [Read the essays](essays.qmd)

**CV**
- [View the CV page](cv.qmd)
- [Download CV (PDF)](assets/CV.pdf)

<div class="icon-links" aria-label="Homepage links">
  <a class="icon-link" href="mailto:marcus.harris@uconn.edu" aria-label="Email Marcus Harris" title="Email">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
  </a>
  <a class="icon-link" href="https://github.com/MarcusHarrisUConn" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub profile" title="GitHub">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
  </a>
  <a class="icon-link" href="https://orcid.org/0009-0002-7001-1584" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="ORCID profile" title="ORCID">
    <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
  </a>
</div>
